findings.description: SLA percentile (99.5th) and performance benchmark percentile (95th) differ for the same 60-second latency threshold. If intentional, it should be explained.
findings.evidence: Stage 4: "99.5% of events delivered within 60 seconds." Performance: "sub-60-second end-to-end latency for 95th-percentile events."
findings.suggestion: Use same percentile or explicitly note different measurement contexts.
